overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunny coastal road lined with palm trees. The character travels past vehicles, crosses the road, and explores the shoreline with scenic mountain and ocean views before approaching a gas station.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal roadside with palm trees and ocean views

events.description: golf cart drives past on the road from right to left
sedan car passes by on the coastal road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right roadside shoulder beside wildflowers and bushes

paved asphalt road with vehicles traveling along the coast

dense bushes and wildflowers growing along the road shoulder

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny coastal road with palm trees lining the left side and the ocean visible to the right. A golf cart and sedan pass by on the road as the character maintains a steady pace along the vegetation-covered shoulder.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with mountain views opening up

events.description: pickup truck towing a boat trailer drives past on the road
character crosses from the right roadside to the left roadside

agents.ego_description: continues walking then crosses the road to the beach side while a truck passes

notable_agents.action: pickup truck towing a white boat trailer driving along the coast

entered.detail: large rocky mountain with forested slopes becoming visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the coast as a large mountain range comes into view across the water. After a truck towing a boat passes by, the character crosses the road to the beach side, shifting perspective to show more of the mountain backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside beach path with prominent mountain backdrop

events.description: character moves from roadside to beachside vegetation with mountain dominating the view

agents.ego_description: walking through wildflowers and gravel along the shoreline with expansive mountain views

segments.scene_description: Walking along the beachside gravel path, the character moves through patches of wildflowers with the massive mountain range now dominating the center of the view. The road is now farther to the left as the character explores the shoreline area.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching gas station on coastal road

events.description: passing speed limit sign reading TRUCKS 20 on the left side
gas station with large sign comes into view ahead on the road

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the road shoulder approaching a gas station area

entered.detail: road sign indicating TRUCKS 20 speed limit
gas station with canopy and large roadside sign visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the gravel shoulder back toward the road, passing a speed limit sign for trucks. The scene transitions to show a gas station ahead as the mountain shifts to the right side of the frame and the road becomes prominent again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal road that gradually shifts from a roadside stroll to an exploration of the shoreline before returning to the main thoroughfare. It begins with the character walking along a vegetation-covered shoulder lined with palm trees as a golf cart and sedan pass by. As the camera continues forward, a large mountain range emerges across the water, prompting the character to cross the road past a boat-towing truck to reach the beach side. The scene then expands across a gravel path dotted with wildflowers, where the massive mountains dominate the center of the frame while the road recedes to the left. Finally, the camera turns back toward the pavement, passing a truck speed limit sign as the mountains shift to the right and a gas station appears ahead.
